name: spotify-related-artists
description: Get Spotify artists similar to a given artist. Use for questions like 'what artists are similar to Radiohead?', 'find artists like Bicep', 'who sounds like Pink Floyd?', 'recommend artists similar to X'. Requires a Spotify artist ID — use spotify-search first to get the ID.

input.description: Path parameter: artist_id (Spotify artist ID, e.g. 4Z8W4fKeB5YxbusRsdQVPb). Get IDs from spotify-search.

output.description: Response with artists array. Each artist has name, genres, popularity (0-100), and Spotify ID.
